== General Xiahou D.'s Eye ==
The dev team has made General Xiahou D. a Cyclops in the game and stripped him of his only eyeball as an organ. Any conscience?

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=General Xiahou D.'s Eye
|Rarity=blue
|ID Number=28
|Initial HP=50
|HP Increase=20
|Initial ATK=2
|ATK Increase=1
|Initial DEF=0
|DEF Increase=0
|Initial RUSH=2
|RUSH Increase=1
|Effect 1=Hit +###%
|Initial Effect Value 1=0.2
|Effect Value Increase 1=0.2
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Dominate [[Cathay_Apostles#Cyclops_Xiahou_D|Apostle General Xiahou D.]], perfectly upgrade [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]] Xiahou D., [[Chore Dispatch]]

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Blue Organs]]
__NOTOC__
